summary: PWA implementation and backend route refactoring verified. ALL 12 FEATURES PASSED: manifest.json with correct name 'The CrossCurrent Hub', theme_color '#09090b', 4 icons; sw.js service worker; offline.html fallback page; all PWA meta tags in index.html; page title 'The CrossCurrent Hub'; all icons served (icon-192, icon-512, apple-touch-icon); GET /api/settings/platform returns settings; GET /api/settings/email-templates requires auth; GET /api/bve/active-signal requires auth; existing routes (login, profit summary, trade active-signal, admin members) still work; frontend login/dashboard/Trade Monitor layout verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ manifest.json: name='The CrossCurrent Hub', short_name='CrossCurrent', theme_color='#09090b', 4 icons (16, 32, 192, 512), display=standalone
✓ sw.js: Proper service worker with install/activate/fetch handlers, stale-while-revalidate strategy, network-first for navigation
✓ offline.html: Beautiful offline fallback with correct styling and branding
✓ index.html: All PWA meta tags present (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon, manifest link)
✓ All icons served at correct paths (/icon-192.png, /icon-512.png, /apple-touch-icon.png)
✓ BVE routes extracted to /app/backend/routes/bve.py - 10 endpoints including enter, exit, rewind, signals, trade/log, summary
✓ Settings routes extracted to /app/backend/routes/settings.py - platform settings, email templates, integration tests, email history
✓ Routes properly registered in server.py with correct prefixes
✓ Login page loads correctly with proper form elements
✓ Trade Monitor has correct 2-column layout (left=signal+lot+time, right=Merin iframe)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 verified PWA implementation and backend refactoring. PWA: manifest.json at /manifest.json, sw.js at /sw.js, offline.html at /offline.html, icons at /icon-192.png, /icon-512.png, /apple-touch-icon.png. Backend: BVE routes at /api/bve/*, Settings routes at /api/settings/*. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_pwa_and_routes.py (30 tests).
